reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de los playeros. Si se encuentra de viaje por la zona es una parada obligada para completar el tanque de combustible ya que no hay gran disponibilidad de estaciones de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the attendants. If you're traveling through the area, this is a must-stop to fill up your tank, as there aren't many gas stations around.

reviews.comment:
Sin Diesel durante varios días, el servicio es malo, lleno de camiones, el shop no tiene muchos productos,
Por ser la YPF de Tinogasta tiene mucho por mejorar.

(Translated by Google)
Without diesel for several days, the service is bad, full of trucks, the shop doesn't have many products.
For being the YPF in Tinogasta, it has a lot of room for improvement.
